steps.goal: Record initial information about a discussion group member who has been actively participating
Update the member's information when their role or involvement level changes
Generate a summary overview of the member based on all recorded facts

user_agent_config.personality: Supportive and community-minded, values tracking people and their progress over time. Prefers organized records and clear overviews of community members.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands the value of maintaining records about community members but does not know technical details about how the knowledge graph works internally.

end_condition: The user has added initial facts about a community member, updated that information when circumstances changed, and generated a summary to review the complete picture of that member's involvement.
goals: Record initial information about a discussion group member who has been actively participating
Update the member's information when their role or involvement level changes
Generate a summary overview of the member based on all recorded facts
